chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ

parts.text: مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مُسْكَانَ

text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ فَاطِمَةَ بِنْتَ أَسَدٍ جَاءَتْ إِلَى أَبِي طَالِبٍ لِتُبَشِّرَهُ بِمَوْلِدِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَالَ أَبُو طَالِبٍ اصْبِرِي سَبْتاً أُبَشِّرْكِ بِمِثْلِهِ إِلَّا النُّبُوَّةَ
وَ قَالَ السَّبْتُ ثَلَاثُونَ سَنَةً وَ كَانَ بَيْنَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) ثَلَاثُونَ سَنَةً .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin yahya Al Farsy, from Abu Haneefa Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Al Waleed Bin Aban, from Muhammad Bin Abdullah Bin Muskan, from his father who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Fatima<sup>asws</sup> Bint Asad<sup>as</sup> came over to Abu Talib<sup>as</sup><sup>ws</sup> in order to give him<sup>as</sup><sup>ws</sup> the glad tidings of the Nazool (Coming) of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup>. So Abu Talib<sup>as</sup><sup>ws</sup> said: ‘Be patient for a ‘Sabta’, I<sup>as</sup> shall give you<sup>as</sup> glad tidings similar to it, except for the Prophet-hood’.
And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The ‘Sabt’ is of thirty years, and between Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> and Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> was (a span of) thirty years’.
en.sarwar: Amir al-Mu’minin Ali (a.s.) was born thirty years after the year of elephant. He was martyred in month of Ramadan twenty first Sunday night in the year fortieth after Hijra (migration). He was sixty three years at that time. He lived for thirty years after the death of the Holy Prophet (s.a). His mother was Fatima daughter of Asad Ibrahimn Hashim ibn ‘Abd Manaf. He was the first person whose both parents belonged to Hashim.
